description: Wire cross-app shared services: notifications dispatch from app backends, cross-app search integration in frontends, and WebSocket gateway event relay. This connects the shared infrastructure packages (packages/notifications, packages/search, services/ws-gateway) into the actual app backends so the ecosystem feels unified with real-time events flowing across apps.
steps: Create packages/notifications/src/services/cross-app-dispatcher.ts: A service class that app backends can import to dispatch notifications to other apps' users. It wraps NotificationFanout with app-specific context (sourceApp name). Methods: notifyUsers(event: { type, title, body, recipientIds, priority, data }). This is the bridge between app backends and the notification system.

Wire notification dispatch into apps/quantmail/backend: In the email routes (apps/quantmail/backend/routes/emails.ts), after successfully sending an email, dispatch a notification to the recipient via the CrossAppDispatcher. Import from @quant/notifications.

Wire notification dispatch into apps/quantchat/backend: In conversation/message routes (apps/quantchat/backend/routes/messages.ts), after sending a message, dispatch a notification to the conversation participants.

Create packages/search/src/services/cross-app-search-api.ts: A lightweight search aggregator that app frontends can call. It provides a unified search interface that routes queries to the appropriate index based on app context. Methods: search(query, { apps: string[], limit, offset }).

Wire cross-app search into apps/quantmail/src/app/api/search/route.ts: Create a Next.js API route that accepts a search query and uses the CrossAppSearch to search emails, contacts, and calendar events.

Wire WebSocket gateway events: Create services/ws-gateway/src/event-handlers.ts that defines event handlers for cross-app events (new_email, new_message, file_shared, meeting_started). These handlers receive events from app backends (via the notification system) and broadcast them to connected WebSocket clients on the appropriate channels.

Create a shared event bus helper at packages/realtime/src/event-bus.ts: A simple publish/subscribe pattern that app backends use to emit events that the ws-gateway picks up. Uses the existing channel infrastructure in @quant/realtime.

Run typecheck and build for all affected packages: pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/notifications --filter=@quant/search --filter=@quant/realtime --filter=@quant/ws-gateway --filter=@quant/quantmail --filter=@quant/quantchat
findings: All builds, typechecks, and tests pass. CrossAppSearchService.indexDocument() already existed with signature (app: string, document: {...}) so adapted the CrossAppSearchApi wrapper to use that. PreferenceService cast as 'never' in CrossAppDispatcher constructor since we only need the shouldNotify and getChannelsForEvent interface subset.
